parent.aiSummary: Alex has had a remarkable week, particularly in STEM subjects. Attention analytics show a 15% increase in focus stability compared to last month. There are no immediate academic or emotional risks detected. The AI suggests encouraging Alex to take a full rest day this weekend to prevent long-term cognitive fatigue, as study streaks are currently at 7 consecutive days.

highRiskAlert.message: The predictive engine has flagged the Business department for a 4.0% dropout risk anomaly. Engagement levels have dropped 12% in the last 3 weeks, specifically correlating with the midterm examination period.

teachingPeak.message: Medicine department shows a 96% engagement index. The recent shift to case-based adaptive learning paths is yielding a 22% higher retention rate. Recommend scaling this pedagogy to Science dept.
